about.name: Rahul Kumar
aboutMe: I'm a developer based in India, building full‑stack applications with React, Node.js, and React Native. I focus on clean code, solid UX, and shipping things that work.
I enjoy turning ideas into reality. Open to collaboration and new opportunities—say hi!

hero.tagline: Full‑stack developer · React, Node.js, MongoDB & Express

projects.title: Pin-it
projects.description: Civic issue reporting platform where users can pin and report local issues on a map. Built for community engagement and transparent municipal feedback.

projects.title: Any Connect
projects.description: Real-time video chat application with WebRTC for peer-to-peer calls. Join rooms, talk, play games and connect with others instantly.

projects.title: FOF - Find Old Friend
projects.description: Platform to reconnect with old friends. User accounts, visitor stats, and donation tracking. Every new friend is a new adventure.

projects.title: Habit Maker
projects.description: Daily habit tracker and todo app to build better routines. Track streaks, set goals, and stay consistent with a clean, focused interface.

projects.title: Task Prioritizer
projects.description: Smart task management tool that helps you prioritize and focus on what matters. Organize, rank, and complete tasks with clarity.

projects.title: GPS Alert
projects.description: GPS Alarm or GPS Alert — mobile app for location-based alerts and notifications. Built with React Native.

contact.message: I'm open to new opportunities and conversations. Reach out via email or connect on LinkedIn and GitHub.
